ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "provider_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the hospital's location */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County where the hospital is located */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Number of beds available in the hospital */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the hospital */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the hospital was established */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "achievement_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for achieving the metric */,
  "benchmark" REAL /* Benchmark value for comparison */,
  "baseline_rate" REAL /* Baseline rate for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance metric */,
  "measurement_period" TEXT /* Period over which the metric is measured (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "metric_weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in the overall performance evaluation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the metric */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "provider_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital's provider number */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric being evaluated */,
  "performance_rate" REAL /* Actual performance rate achieved by the hospital */,
  "achievement_points" TEXT /* Points awarded for achievement based on performance */,
  "improvement_points" TEXT /* Points awarded for improvement based on performance */,
  "measure_score" TEXT /* Score calculated for the performance measure */,
  "measurement_period" TEXT /* Period over which the performance data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source from which the performance data was obtained */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the performance data */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was reviewed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments regarding the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_performance_provider_number FOREIGN KEY ("provider_number") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_performance_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hospital_admin, regulator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table that was affected by the action */,
  "affected_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was affected by the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments regarding the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback submitted */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., bug, suggestion, complaint) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
